response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior-level engineer with 13+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level role. Strong technical fit on TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud, but severe seniority mismatch creates high flight risk, compensation gap, and likely boredom. Also based in Berlin while role requires high on-site presence — location may or may not align. Overqualification dominates the decision.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms
Software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) aligns with clean architecture interest
Berlin-based with relevant fullstack and AWS/Kubernetes exposure
concerns: Severe overqualification — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position
High attrition risk and likely compensation mismatch for a junior band
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js explicitly listed (MongoDB is the primary DB experience)
